name: v8.125.0
body:
## What's Changed
* chore(ci): use dd-sts for system-tests test optimization by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/788
* Remove system-tests pin by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/801
* Onzia/add us2 by @ojproductions in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/802
* fix: pin ddtrace to <4.8.0 to avoid import errors by @brettlangdon in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/811
* Replace use of _SpanPointer and AgentWriter by @rithikanarayan in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/812
* ci: install upstream ddtrace wheel during PR-triggered unit tests by @purple4reina in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/813
* Revert "ci: install upstream ddtrace wheel during PR-triggered unit tests" by @rithikanarayan in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/814
* v8.125.0 by @ojproductions in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/pull/819
* Reintroduces `base_service` for Python Serverless Spans by @zarirhamza in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-py/pull/17238

>[!IMPORTANT]
> For Python 3.8 and 3.9: `dd-trace-py` version is [v3.19.6](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-py/releases/tag/v3.19.6)
> For Python >= 3.10: `dd-trace-py` version is [v4.8.1](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-py/releases/tag/v4.8.1)


>[!IMPORTANT]
> This layer is currently unavailable in aws region `me-south-1`, due to unrelated incidents


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-python/compare/v8.124.0...v8.125.0
